zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Llywelyn於大約1210年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Llywelyn ab Iorwerth37歲，母親Joan Lady of Wales23歲。她和Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1260年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad ferch Llywelyn于大约1210年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Llywelyn ab Iorwerth37岁，母亲Joan Lady of Wales23岁。她和Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1260年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Llywelyn was born about 1210, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, was 37 and her mother, Joan Lady of Wales, was 23. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen. She died in 1260, at the age of 51.

fr.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Llywelyn est née environ 1210, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Lady of Wales, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen. Elle est décédée en 1260, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Llywelyn um 1210 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 37 und ihre Mutter Joan Lady of Wales 23. Sie hatte mit Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Llywelyn è nata il circa 1210 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Joan Lady of Wales, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen. Morì nel 1260, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Llywelynが約1210年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ab Iorwerthは37歳，母Joan Lady of Walesは23歳であった。彼女はMaelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Henとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1260年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1210년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Lady of Wales(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Llywelyn родилась около 1210 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lady of Wales, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen. Она умерла в 1260 г. в возрасте 51 год.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Maelgwn Fychan ap Maelgwn Hen. Murió en 1260, a la edad de 51 años.
